summary: Completed frontend testing of Lineup Admin Dashboard z-index fixes for dropdown interactions. Found critical overlay interference issue still present despite z-index adjustments.

critical_bugs.issue: DateRangeFilter overlay still intercepts clicks on Export CSV dropdown after DateRangeFilter is used
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot use Export CSV functionality after opening Date Range Filter
critical_bugs.technical_details: DateRangeFilter overlay (fixed inset-0, z-index 60) remains active and blocks clicks to ExportButtons dropdown even after DateRangeFilter closes

critical_bugs.issue: Mobile sidebar overlay cannot be clicked to close sidebar - overlay intercepted by sidebar nav element
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot close mobile sidebar by clicking overlay
critical_bugs.technical_details: Sidebar nav element intercepts pointer events meant for overlay click-to-close functionality

passed_tests: Dashboard loads correctly with all KPI cards and charts
Date Range Filter dropdown opens and presets are clickable ('Last 30 Days' works)
Export CSV dropdown opens when Date Range Filter has not been used first
Export CSV 'Users Data' button works when accessed directly
Mobile hamburger menu appears and opens sidebar correctly
All visual elements and charts render correctly
success_percentage: Frontend: 70% - Core functionality works but critical interaction bugs prevent full workflow
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix z-index stacking context issues: 1) DateRangeFilter overlay remains active and blocks Export CSV after date filter interaction 2) Mobile sidebar overlay cannot be clicked due to nav element interference. The z-index fix is incomplete - overlay cleanup and proper stacking context isolation needed.
